# Bloom Energy

**Category:** Generators & Microgrids  
**Website:** https://www.bloomenergy.com/

## Headline
On-site power and fuel cell platform relevant to resilient digital infrastructure and grid-constrained compute deployment strategies.

## Overview
Bloom Energy matters because power availability is becoming a first-order constraint in AI infrastructure. It belongs in the map as an example of how nontraditional on-site generation and distributed energy providers may shape future data center and compute campus decisions.

## Key capabilities
- on-site generation strategy for constrained-grid environments
- fuel-cell-based resilience and distributed energy options
- relevance to compute campuses where power access is the gating factor

## Best fit for
- developers evaluating alternatives to conventional backup-only power thinking
- teams exploring on-site generation as part of AI infrastructure planning
- researchers tracking convergence between energy infrastructure and compute deployment

## Considerations
Best compared with microgrid, battery-storage, and site-strategy vendors to understand whether the real advantage comes from resiliency, speed to energization, or long-term operating economics.
